caption: The video features a man seated in front of a backdrop that reads "United States Institute of Peace." He is dressed formally in a dark suit, white shirt, and tie, with a name tag pinned to his lapel. The man appears to be engaged in a discussion or presentation, as he gestures with his right hand while speaking. His expression changes slightly between the frames, suggesting he is actively communicating and possibly emphasizing points during his speech. The setting suggests a formal event or conference related to peace and international affairs.
